author: nflaig
content:
related to this, I don't think dora should be using the event once everyone has `execution_payload` implemented from https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/588

`execution_payload_available` is only for ptc and doesn't actually verify the execution payload, I think what dora wants is an event that mirrors existing `block` event
